zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Radcliffe於1479年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾蘭卡斯特時，她的父親Sir John Thomas Radcliffe25歲，母親Elizabeth Brereton21歲。她於1494年之前與Sir Roger Dalton結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1593年在英國藍卡爾享年114歲。

nameMeanings.name: Radcliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ratliff
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from one or more of the places so named, such as Radcliffe (Lancashire), Radcliffe on Trent and Ratcliffe on Soar (both Nottinghamshire), Radclive (Buckinghamshire), Ratcliffe Culey and Ratcliffe on the Wreake (both Leicestershire), Ratclyffe in Clyst Hydon, Ratcliffes in Thorverton, and Ratcliffes in Broad Clyst (all Devon), Ratcliff in Stepney (Middlesex), and Rackley in Compton Bishop (Somerset). The placenames derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + clif ‘cliff, bank, steep slope’ (see also Rutley ). A family of the name Radcliffe trace their descent from Sir Nicholas de Radclyffe. He is said to have been a knight who held the major of Radcliffe in Lancashire and served Roger de Poitou, Baron de Marsey in the 11th century.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Radcliffe was born in 1479, in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Thomas Radcliffe, was 25 and her mother, Elizabeth Brereton, was 21. She married Sir Roger Dalton before 1494. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1593, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 114.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Radcliffe est née en 1479, à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Thomas Radcliffe, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Brereton, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Roger Dalton avant 1494. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1593, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 114 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Radcliffe 1479 in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Thomas Radcliffe 25 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Brereton 21. Sie hat vor 1494 Sir Roger Dalton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1593 im Alter von 114 Jahren in Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Radcliffe è nata il nel 1479 nel Lancaster, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Thomas Radcliffe, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Brereton, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir Roger Dalton prima del 1494. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1593, nel Lancashire, England, all'età di 114 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Radcliffe(이)가 1479년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 랭커스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Thomas Radcliffe(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Brereton(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1494년 이전 Sir Roger Dalton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1593년 영국 랭카실르에서 114세의 나이로 사망했다.
